title: rytidostylis glabra
intro: Rytidostylis glabra, also known as the Smooth Rytidostylis or Smooth Stylo, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Africa and Madagascar. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Rytidostylis glabra include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Rytidostylis glabra can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used in combination with other medicinal plants to enhance their effects.
